prose:
**Fukui Reactivity Indices for Aniline**

Fukui reactivity indices were computed for aniline using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** level (tier `standard`, density-fit) with PySCF, in the **gas phase**, with a charge of **0** and multiplicity of **1**. The geometry was obtained from the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz` file. The SCF for all states (neutral, cation, and anion) converged.

The most **electrophilic** site is **C (atom 3)** with a fukui f+ index of **2.2975867**.
The most **nucleophilic** site is **N (atom 1)** with a fukui f- index of **0.20452359**.

A plot of the Fukui reactivity is available at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/argo_gemini-2.5-flash/20260703-185647_aniline_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.
